dimensions.name: Genre Alignment
dimensions.description: Primary music/event genre match against taste profile

dimensions.name: Venue Quality
dimensions.description: Artistic merit and sophistication of venue

dimensions.name: Experience Format
dimensions.description: Event structure: concert, workshop, immersive, family-friendly, etc.

dimensions.name: Social Context
dimensions.description: Solo, date night, group, family-friendly scoring

dimensions.name: Time Investment vs. Joy Yield
dimensions.description: Distance, duration, logistics vs. expected happiness return

scoring_scale.5: High Priority - Must-see. Core taste profile match (electronic downtempo, orchestral crossover, intellectual experience, family adventure).
scoring_scale.4: Strong Interest - High affinity. Verified favorites or direct taste alignment (modern jazz, indie rock, immersive experiences).
scoring_scale.3: Medium Interest - Good for date night or hanging out. Secondary genres (funk, soul, stand-up comedy, indie rock).
scoring_scale.2: Low Interest - Avoid unless iconic/legendary. Anti-preferences without exceptional context.
scoring_scale.1: Strong Pass - Generic top 40, mumble rap, modern country radio, heavy metal screamo, clubby bottle service scenes.

electronic.sound_profile: Chill but moving, intelligent dance music, euphoric/melodic, cinematic/immersive
electronic.special_interest: Anjunadeep sound, orchestral electronic, Cercle shows abroad, Red Bull Symphonic events

medium_priority_3.vibe: Good for date night or hanging out, but not a must-see.

avoid: Mumble Rap / Generic Trap (unless high production value like Travis Scott)

clubs_and_underground: Enthea Tea (SE Portland - No alcohol wind-down)
venue_preferences.special_interest: Prefers smaller, unique venues over massive arenas; focus on artistic merit and sophisticated sound design

special_contexts: Adults-only / Recovery spaces (tea houses, saunas, float tanks)

product_objectives: Personal event discovery tool for Dima+Jeannie (and potentially shareable public version)
Centralized calendar and filter system to identify high-priority events (4-5 score)
Real-time decision support: "What's a good night out in May?" natural language querying
Agent-driven data pipeline to minimize manual event entry from external sources (Bandsintown, RA, Do404, Eventbrite)
Internal coordination layer: friend interest signaling, RSVP tracking, thread-per-event logistics
Future: real ticket availability scraping, weather integration for outdoor events, driving time estimates
Public shareable version: clean read-only view without friend names or private data
design_principles: Clean, minimal UI - static 4-file architecture (index.html, data.js, style.css, app.js) with zero backend overhead
Fixed navigation bar with calendar/search/filter access
Card-based event grid with inline quick-view posters
Drawer-style detail view with YouTube section, description, RSVP signals, and thread comments
Single-month calendar widget with prev/next navigation
Real-time search and filtering without page reload
Gradient backgrounds per event category (music, family, comedy, outdoor, social, date)
YouTube thumbnail backgrounds for immersive visual context
Event posters (for non-YouTube events) with category emoji and text at bottom-left (like real flyers)
Progressive disclosure: compact cards expand to full drawer on click
target_vibe: Curated, artistic, human-scale discovery tool for a pair (Dima+Jeannie) who value melodic electronic music, immersive experiences, intimate venues, and thoughtful cultural activities. The site should feel like a trusted friend who knows your taste and nudges you toward the perfect night out.

examples: Fernbank After Dark: Cocktails & the Cosmos (science night with cosmic cocktails, live music, tapas)
Fernbank After Dark: Love Lab (chemistry + pheromones + animal romance)
Fernbank After Dark: The Big Chill (ice science + frosty cocktails)
Sips Under the Sea (aquarium after-hours with music, tapas, cocktails)
Dinner Detective Murder Mystery (interactive crime-solving dinner show)
Al Capone's Speakeasy Escape Room (1920s gangster-themed with in-room actor)
Prohibition Themed Progressive Dinner (multi-course speakeasy hopping)
Atlanta Outdoor Murder Mystery 2 (whodunit theater walk as couples)
Pigalle Cabaret & Speakeasy (Bohemian Paris-themed theater, burlesque, jazz, absinthe)
Candlelight: Hip Hop on Strings (intimate string quartet of hip-hop classics)
Whiplash Comedy Club (new intimate comedy venue)
Can't Even Comedy Show (HBO/Comedy Central comics, rooftop theater)
Date Night in the ATL Comedy (local talent at cultural center)
Fox Theatre - Alvin Ailey Dance (high-end dance performance)
Romantic Date Night - Candle Making (BYOB candle-making with wine)
Love at First Scent: Valentine's Perfume-Making (custom perfume workshop)
BYOB Spray Paint and Sip (graffiti-style painting with black light vibes)
Wine Down Wednesday: Wine + Candle Making
High Museum of Art - Jazz Fridays (art + live jazz)
Fernbank After Dark (all events - science + sophistication)
Atlanta Beltline Cocktails and Bites (guided walk with craft cocktails)
City Lights Night Tour (scenic tour with photos + dinner stop)
Skyline Park Date Night (rooftop games, carnival eats, beer garden, skyline views)

p0_critical.description: Drop a URL or screenshot into Claude → agent parses event details → appends to data.js. Reduce manual entry to near-zero. Priority: Bandsintown, RA ATL, Do404.
Eventbrite, RA, venue Instagram → pull actual event flyers. Replace YouTube thumbnails as primary card image for non-music events. Priority: Disclosure, Sub Focus, Shaky Knees, DWTD+Magic Sword.
Per-event tags: 'I'm in', 'Maybe', 'Pass'. Signals shown on cards. Storage: localStorage. Public version: hide friend names, show aggregate counts.
URL-based toggle (?mode=internal) or password-protected route. Public version: read-only, no friend names. Internal: coordination, agent mode, RSVP signals.

p1_high_value.description: Collapsible thread inside drawer for notes, logistics, coordination. Storage: localStorage keyed by event ID.
Query box: 'What's a good group night in May that hasn't been planned yet?' Cross-references availability, event scores. Local LLM (Ollama) or Claude API.
For S/A-tier shows marked advancePurchase: true, check if still available. Background agent checks every 24h. Surfaced as 'Last checked' timestamp on urgent badge. Firecrawl for scraping.
Sol Dance, Five Rhythms, High Museum Second Sundays, Full Moon Drum Circle. Auto-generate full cadence from recurringRule field.
For outdoor events within 2 weeks, pull forecast from OpenWeatherMap. Show badge: '🌞 Clear · 🌧 Rain'. Priority: Shake the Lake, ATL Jazz Festival, Shaky Knees.
Replace categorical distance (ITP/OTP) with computed driving time from home (30306). Display '~18 min'. API: Google Maps Distance Matrix or Mapbox.

p2_enhancement.description: For urgent+advancePurchase events: 'Sub Focus is 2 days away and you haven't bought a ticket.' Delivery: Pushover or SMS via Twilio.
Shared RSVP state between Dima+Jeannie. Could be: Supabase, PocketBase, or Cloudflare Worker + KV. Unlocks real-time sync and babysitter logic.
Past events flip to archive view. Stats: '14 shows attended in 2026, 8 were S/A-tier'. Journal-style entry per attended event.
ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus states, screen-reader-friendly event cards.

gap_opportunities: Niche culinary pop-ups (Underground Atlanta rotating food hall)
Wellness retreats (North Georgia 1hr drive, Sol-style weekend immersions)
Participatory art (Burning Man prep workshops, Westside area)

metadata.summary: Comprehensive taste profile, scoring framework, design objectives, and V3 roadmap for the ATL Events discovery site. Includes 841 cataloged events, 71-artist verified favorites, and scoring rubric across 5 dimensions (genre alignment, venue quality, experience format, social context, time investment vs. joy yield). Primary user persona: Dima Perkis, VP Data & Analytics at Lahzo, with high affinity for downtempo electronic, orchestral crossovers, intimate artistic venues, and immersive cultural experiences. Secondary focus: family adventure activities with Dean (toddler) and baby. Date night mode: curated romantic/sophisticated experiences with Jeannie.
